summary: R3 closes the prior systems findings. The default player shell now enters the topology-backed snapshot path, the browser Pixi renderer consumes read-model anchor instructions, the regenerated screenshots visibly show irregular districts plus route-node markers and route 24, and the perturbation regression now reprojects a changed topology DTO while holding path preview/reason-code/drawable-route invariants. No forbidden package/schema paths were modified.

findings.summary: Browser route-node anchors are rendered from MapAnchorRenderInstruction/read-model data, not inferred by the renderer.
evidence: packages/map-renderer/src/index.ts:735 adds anchor markers to the Pixi anchor layer
packages/map-renderer/src/index.ts:832 creates visual-only anchor markers with eventMode none

findings.summary: R3 screenshots are sufficient systems evidence that the default map no longer reads as a rectangular, hex, or regular lattice board.
evidence: tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts:704 captures the map region after forcing a readable 420px evidence surface

findings.summary: The geometry perturbation test now changes topology DTO polygon coordinates, reprojects through projectM7TopologyClientReadModels, and asserts route/path invariants against the reprojected result.
evidence: tests/map-renderer-m2-map.test.ts:210 constructs a perturbed topology DTO
tests/map-renderer-m2-map.test.ts:234 asserts path preview signature stability
tests/map-renderer-m2-map.test.ts:241 asserts 25 source route edges, one drawable route, and route 24 as the drawable route

tests_reviewed.notes: Changed tracked paths are limited to allowed apps/web, packages/client-core, packages/map-renderer, packages/ui, tests, project/messages, project/tasks, and project state files. No packages/protocol, packages/sim-core, packages/save-format, content-source, docs gate/roadmap, tools, .github, manifest, or validation-report changes were present.
30 Playwright tests passed; regenerated default topology evidence screenshots and asserted data-anchor-count=8, data-route-count=1, and data-route-source-count=25.
format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.
Both evidence screenshots show irregular district polygons, route-node markers, a single explicit route 24 line, current/control/action affordances, and no rectangular/hex/regular lattice board.

Default topology path did not introduce centroid/bbox/nearest/hex/axial/cube/WorldState inference. M2_PROTOTYPE_GRID_COLUMNS hits are confined to the legacy M2 fixture path, not createBootstrappedShellSnapshot.

decisions.decision: Accept the route-node-only route rendering boundary for this client task.
decisions.rationale: The current accepted DTO surface provides explicit drawable route-node endpoints only for route 24. The client keeps all 25 topology routeEdges and all district endpoint legs in path preview/reason copy, but only draws route-node-to-route-node polylines. Drawing district endpoint legs without an explicit per-edge polyline DTO would require centroid/bbox/visual-neighbor guessing and would violate the product anti-grid constraint. This task forbids protocol/schema changes, so richer per-edge drawable geometry belongs in a future schema/read-model task if product wants those legs visualized.

apps/web/src/shell/create-shell-snapshot.ts now routes createBootstrappedShellSnapshot through createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot. The default browser evidence reports topology-region-network, player-grid not-used, topology hash 1ba53651, 14 districts, 8 anchors, 25 topology route sources, and 1 drawable route.

UI consumes ClientReadModelSnapshot fields and localized reason-code copy. Pixi renders from MapRenderPlan instructions and reports test attributes. No UI or renderer code writes WorldState or imports sim-core.

risks.risk: Only route 24 is visually drawn in this milestone because explicit per-edge polylines are not present for district endpoint edges.
risks.boundary: Accepted for M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001. Future work that needs all path legs visible must add/consume an explicit schema/read-model polyline surface in a protocol-owned task, not synthesize geometry in the client.

risks.risk: Route-node markers are functional low-fidelity dots, not final map art.
risks.boundary: Acceptable for systems review; visual/product polish remains a later art/readability concern.

risks.risk: Legacy M2 fixture code still exists for non-default tests and fixtures.
risks.boundary: Accepted because createBootstrappedShellSnapshot no longer uses it and tests assert no M2 default player path.

requested_action: QA reviewer should continue with functional/visual QA and required release validation from the R3 writer handoff. Systems architecture accepts R3.
